issuer_name_as_stated: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation tables show criminal matters against the Company (1), Directors (1) and Promoters (Nil), while the Company's 3 criminal cases are expressly filed by the Company and excluded; therefore criminal cases against total 2. Statutory/regulatory matters against the Company and Directors are Nil, while the Promoters table reports 2 actions taken by statutory and regulatory authorities; tax proceedings counted against the Company are 5, excluding the Promoters' personal tax matter and all 'By our Company' rows. The quantified aggregate against the Company is ₹4,624.04 million of civil matters + ₹1,051.15 million of taxation matters + ₹6.35 million of Insurance Ombudsman awards = ₹5,681.54 million, or ₹568.154 crore; the source contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated nil aggregate as of September 30, 2021. The concentration percentages disclosed relate to retail health/group health or geographic segments, not company-wide top-five/top-ten customers; no qualifying company-wide customer concentration percentage is disclosed. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ in millions, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
